payload.message:
Morning brief time. Do the following:
1. Check Jira PORT, MMA, AD, and DLV boards for: overdue tickets, tickets due this week, in-progress tickets with no recent updates (48h+), and any high-priority items.
2. Check recent GitHub activity on MarekHealth repos (hos-portal-api, hos-core-ui) — any overnight PRs merged, CI failures, deploys.
3. Pull top 3 most urgent action items for J.
4. Check memory for yesterday's notes for continuity.
5. Deliver a concise morning brief to J via Telegram in this format:

☀️ Morning Brief — [Day Date]

🔴 Top Priority Today
1. [Most urgent item + due date]
2. [Second]
3. [Third]

⚠️ Blockers
- [Blocked tickets or stale items]

📅 Due This Week
- [Tickets due in next 5 days]

Keep it under 300 words. Lead with what needs action today.
Afternoon follow-up. Check for any new Jira updates on the PORT board since this morning. If workspace/HANDOFF.md exists and has pending work, continue it. Log progress to memory/{{date}}.md.
